  • Changelog

Helper function for ZIPLN initialization.

Source: R/utils.R
compute_ZIPLN_starting_point.Rd

Fast LM-based starting point for ZIPLN: one multivariate lm.fit for the PLN component and empirical zero rates / binomial GLMs for the ZI component. Replaces the previous per-species pscl::zeroinfl loop.

compute_ZIPLN_starting_point(Y, X, X0, O, w = NULL)

Arguments

Y

Response count matrix (n × p)

X

Design matrix for the PLN component (n × d)

X0

Design matrix for the ZI component (n × d0, empty matrix(NA,0,0) when unused)

O

Offset matrix in log-scale (n × p)

w

Weight vector of length n (defaults to uniform weights)

Value

Named list: B (d × p), M (n × p), S2 (n × p), R (n × p), B0 (d0 × p)

Contents

Developed by Julien Chiquet, Mahendra Mariadassou, Stéphane Robin, François Gindraud.
